name: SNX-5422
description: SNX-5422 is a synthetic, novel, small molecule Hsp90 Inhibitor. As an oral formulation that demonstrates strong efficacy and tolerability, SNX-5422 is positioned as a breakthrough therapy with broad applicability across a wide range of cancers.
mechanismOfAction: SNX-5422 is a direct, potent inhibitor of Hsp90 across a broad range of human cancer cell lines and causes degradation of important Hsp90 client proteins including HER2, AKT and ERK.
pharmacodynamics: SNX-5422 is under development by Serenex. It is orally administered (pill form). Once in the body, SNX-5422 is converted to SNX-2122; that is, SNX-5422 is a prodrug of SNX-2112, which is the active form.
